examples: The paintings in this cave refute the old theory that Cro-Magnon people painted animals that they hunted and then ate.
The Thenardier catastrophe involved the catastrophe of Magnon.
After all, whether a Cro-Magnon or a Myhrvold, no bone collector wants to get skinned.
The earliest fish hooks were probably carved out of wood more than 30, 000 years ago by Cro-Magnon man.
